# feat(kaizen): SPEC-02 provider split + SPEC-04 BaseAgent slimming

<!-- Generated by SessionEnd hook from a commit matching a journal-worthy pattern.
     Next session: review, then promote to a real journal entry OR delete. -->

**Commit**: `626b008b47cf` — feat(kaizen): SPEC-02 provider split + SPEC-04 BaseAgent slimming

**Body**:

SPEC-02: Per-provider module split
- New kaizen.providers package with llm/ and embedding/ subpackages
- Provider classes: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Azure, Ollama, Docker,
  Mock, Perplexity, Cohere, HuggingFace
- Base types (BaseAIProvider, LLMProvider, EmbeddingProvider,
  UnifiedAIProvider), cost tracking, errors, registry helpers
- ai_providers.py slimmed to backward-compatibility shim
- Gemini provider: #340 mutual-exclusion guard strips
  response_mime_type/response_json_schema when tools are present,
  emits WARN log

SPEC-04: BaseAgent slimming (2004 -> 926 lines)
- Extracted MCPMixin, A2AMixin, AgentLoop, deprecation utilities
- Duplicated MCP tool methods removed from base_agent.py
  (BaseAgent inherits via MCPMixin)
- New posture field on BaseAgentConfig for trust ceiling
- __init_subclass__ hook warns when subclasses override 7
  deprecated extension points (composition wrappers preferred)
- #339 MCP imports migrated from kailash.mcp_server to kailash_mcp

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
